site.title: Journey • Brotherhood of Knowledge with Light

termos1.title: Journey
termos1.subtitle: NOTICE
termos1.li2: By starting, you accept the terms.
termos1.li3: The PDF will be generated at the end.
termos1.li5: Access is limited to the defined period.
termos1.li9: Prepare your mind with positive intention.

termos2.title: Liability Term
termos2.li1: There is no guarantee of results.
termos2.li3: You are responsible for your choices.
termos2.li5: The AI Guide acts as a symbolic mentor.
termos2.li6: The guide does not replace professionals.
termos2.li8: The journey is an interpretive experience.

senha.title: Enter the Keyword
senha.p1: The Keyword is the secret that will open your journey.
senha.p2: Choose carefully, as it reflects your intention.

guia.title: Choose Your Guide
guia.subtitle: Hello, {{nome}}! Choose your guide for the Journey.
guia.p1: To unlock the Guide, enter your name
guia.notice: Hover gently over the buttons to preview each guide’s profile. To confirm your choice, click again or use a double click.
guia.armed: You chose {{guia}}. Click again to confirm.
guia.timeout: Time expired. Select the guide and click again to confirm.
guia.load_error: Unable to load the guides. Please try again later.

zion.descricao: ZION Curious and direct, seeks deep answers with a cosmic vision.

lumen.descricao: LUMEN Warm and reflective, guides with empathy and clarity.

arian.descricao: ARIAN Creative and versatile, inspires with innovative perspectives.

selfie.title: Take Your Photo
selfie.instruction: {nome}, move the phone a little away and position your face. {guia} will guide you.
selfie.error: Could not access the camera. Check permissions.

dados.title: Personal Data
dados.subtitle: Fill in the data to enrich your feedback.
dados.obs: Anything important you wish to share?

block_feedback_waiting: CONGRATULATIONS!!! We have completed {blocoNome}. I am gathering the most precious signals...
We have finished {blocoNome}. Wait a moment while I contemplate this crossing with care...
What a beautiful step we took in {blocoNome}! Now I gather the flames of this stage...
We concluded {blocoNome}. I am observing every thread to return clarity and direction...
Stage completed: {blocoNome}. I now collect the echoes to respond with all the light you shared.

final.title: End of the Journey
final.p1: Your answers were received with honor by the Brotherhood.
final.p2: You planted seeds of trust, courage and light.
final.p3: Keep walking. The journey never ends.
final.p4: Come back whenever you need to rekindle your flame.
final.p5: You are the light. You are the change.
